case_title: LAIRD, DAVID T. VS OLDKNOW NIELSEN ASSOCIATES (PATRICIA NIELSEN ) et al

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FILED BY DEFEND. REQUESTING DISMISSAL OF CLAIM BECAUSE OF ARBITRATION.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT TO DISMISS CASE FOR LACK OF VENUE FILED. CHALLENGE OF VENUE SENT TO DEFT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OLDKNOW NIELSEN ASSOCIATES (JERRY OLDKNOW )

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LAIRD, DAVID T. AS TO DEFENDANT OLDKNOW NIELSEN ASSOCIATES (PATRICIA NIELSEN ) OLDKNOW NIELSEN ASSOCIATES (JERRY OLDKNOW ) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT OLDKNOW NIELSEN ASSOCIATES (PATRICIA NIELSEN ) OLDKNOW NIELSEN ASSOCIATES (JERRY OLDKNOW ) THE ARBITRATION CLAUSE IN THE PLFT/DEFT AGREEMENT WHICH IS DISCUSSED IN DEFTS' 9/27/96 & 12/27/96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
IS DISMISSED BECAUSE PLFT FAILED TO APPEAR ON 1/23/97 AND NOT BECAUSE OF IMPROPER VENUE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-17-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-23-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
THE ARBITRATON CLAUSE IN THE PLFT/DEFT AGREEMENT WHICH IS DISCUSSED IN DEFTS' 9/27/96 & 12/27/96 LETTERS DOES NOT RAISE A VENUE ISSUE. THIS ACTION
